parent_idea: Replay-CLI for Stripe webhooks during local dev: records prod payloads to SQLite, replays into a localhost server with re-signed signatures.
new_evidence_summary: 2 weeks post-research: Stripe shipped `stripe listen --replay` (covers ~30% of the wedge). Hookdeck added local-replay (paid). twit_sh @t3dotgg now recommends Hookdeck for new teams.
why: core local-dev primitive still differentiated, but the wedge tightened — pivot to focused payments-eng workflow rather than generic webhook replay

parent_idea: Grant-budget rewriter for federal R01 NIH applications: parses PI narrative + R01 PHS-398 template, outputs a compliant budget justification DOCX.
new_evidence_summary: 3 weeks post-research: NIH FY27 modular budget cap raised to $300k, no template change. Two new SaaS competitors emerged in HHS grants (BudgetIQ, GrantClerk) — both target K-awards, not R01s.
why: competition fragments by award type; R01 wedge is still wide open; pricing comp shifted (BudgetIQ at $99/mo) — adjust upward

parent_idea: On-chain reputation system for autonomous AI agents — score agents by transaction history, flag bad actors.
new_evidence_summary: 1 week post-research: EigenLayer announced AVS-based agent verification at Devcon. Multiple Solana protocols (Drift, Jupiter) confirmed they're building in-house reputation; not buying.
why: EigenLayer absorbs the EVM lane, in-house captures the Solana lane. No buyer-side wedge remains.

parent_idea: Solana DeFi vault aggregator that auto-rotates LP positions across Drift / Kamino / Jupiter Perps based on funding-rate APR.
new_evidence_summary: 4 weeks post-research: a16z-backed Vault.fi launched with same wedge but charges 2% mgmt fee. Drift APR dropped 40% post-points-S2. New Solana memecoin LP yields surged.
why: Vault.fi validates demand but anchors the price band high; refine to 0.5% perf-only fee and add memecoin-LP path
expected_summary_signals: memecoin LP is the new lane

parent_idea: An AI agent marketplace for legal contract review — solo lawyers post NDAs/MSAs, agents bid to review with citations.
new_evidence_summary: 6 weeks post-research: Harvey AI raised Series D and shipped a marketplace SKU for solo lawyers ($49/mo). Cooley added an in-house tool free for portfolio companies. NDA volume on Upwork dropped 22%.
why: Harvey owns the brand + price; Cooley closes the captive demand; no defensible wedge remains for new entrants

parent_idea: Marketplace for Claude Code skills with x402 monetization — skill authors set per-call price, callers pay-as-they-go.
new_evidence_summary: 2 weeks post-research: Anthropic shipped first-party skill discovery in Claude.ai. A new x402 facilitator (Cloudflare) launched with sub-cent settlement. solana-claude (Superteam Brasil community) ships free skills.
why: first-party discovery covers index lookup but not paid execution; Cloudflare cuts settlement cost; refine to thin facilitator-side wrapper
